name: Zonules.com Route Translation Map
note: Schema-based registry. Sprint 7G expands the governed French layer to 100 indexed anchor/core pages. All language-invariant fields (concept_id, term_id, fio_class, fis_criterion, safety_class, claim_ids, source_ids) are frozen from the English master and must not be mutated.

field_definitions.english_path: The frozen English route path from data/routes.json.
field_definitions.concept_id: Language-invariant concept identifier from English markdown frontmatter. Never mutated.
field_definitions.term_id: Language-invariant term identifier from English markdown frontmatter. Never mutated.
field_definitions.layer: L1, L2, or L3 â same as English master. Language-invariant.
field_definitions.fio_class: FIO class from data/routes.json â language-invariant.
field_definitions.fis_criterion: FIS criterion from data/routes.json â language-invariant.
field_definitions.safety_class: Safety classification from data/routes.json â language-invariant.
field_definitions.claim_ids: Claim IDs from data/claims.json that apply to this route â language-invariant.
field_definitions.source_ids: Source IDs from data/sources.json that apply to this route â language-invariant.

translations.path: Full URL path including language prefix.
translations.slug: Translated term slug in the target language.
translations.indexable: false until status=launched and governance entry authorizes.

governance_rules: All fields except translations.* are frozen from the English master.
translations.status may advance to launched only via DECISION_LOG.md governance entry.
translations.indexable must remain false until status=launched.
translations.hreflang_active must remain false until a governance entry authorizes it.
Pilot status in languages.json allows individual page indexing when status=launched in this map.
Full language launch requires all 300 pages at status=launched and a DECISION_LOG.md entry.
